name: Cape May Clam Chowder
recipeIngredient: 4 medium Tomatoes, peeled and chopped (or 1 can tomatoes)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the bacon in a saucepan until crispy.
2. Add onion and chopped green peppers to the bacon fat; sauté until onions are translucent.
3. Stir in carrots and celery; cook for an additional 5 minutes, or until vegetables are tender.
4. Add clam broth and water (equal amounts) to the pot; bring to a simmer.
5. Stir in potatoes, thyme, parsley, salt, pepper, sugar, and chopped scallops.
6. Simmer for 15 minutes.
7. Add chopped clams and tomatoes with their juice; cook for an additional 7 minutes.
8. Adjust seasoning with salt and pepper if needed.
9. Serve hot.
